english: A child who is not embraced by the village will burn it down to feel its warmth
ibibio: Emi edi mme nte ke ufok

english: The forest would be silent if no bird sang except the one that sang best

A tree is straightened while it is young
Knowledge is like a garden if it is not cultivated it cannot be harvested
One who tells the stories rules the world
Speak softly and carry a big stick
Unity is strength division is weakness
The elder who speaks truth is worth more than gold
Artificial intelligence is changing the world
